summary: preinstall script reads /flag* and exfiltrates contents over HTTP
details: On `npm install`, the package's preinstall lifecycle hook executes `cat /flag*` and PUTs the resulting contents (embedded in a JSON `manifest` field) to http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/modules/ECT-472839, falling back to:8080 and:80 on the same path. This reads arbitrary installer-side filesystem content matching `/flag*` at install time and transmits it to a listening HTTP service. The shape is canonical CTF / sandbox-probe / secret-harvest behavior: an unconditional shell read of a fixed sensitive path and an outbound write to a hardcoded endpoint, fired automatically with no user interaction. The package has no legitimate functionality consistent with reading root-level flag files at install time.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
